# preprocessing { #forensicface.preprocessing }

`preprocessing`

Preprocessing helpers for recognition ONNX inputs.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [normalize_aligned_keypoints](#forensicface.preprocessing.normalize_aligned_keypoints) | Normalize aligned 5-point keypoints to the [0, 1] ONNX input frame. |
| [to_ada_input](#forensicface.preprocessing.to_ada_input) | Convert aligned BGR face crop(s) to AdaFace-style NCHW input. |

### normalize_aligned_keypoints { #forensicface.preprocessing.normalize_aligned_keypoints }

```python
preprocessing.normalize_aligned_keypoints(
    aligned_keypoints,
    *,
    model_name,
    image_size=(112, 112),
)
```

Normalize aligned 5-point keypoints to the [0, 1] ONNX input frame.

### to_ada_input { #forensicface.preprocessing.to_ada_input }

```python
preprocessing.to_ada_input(aligned_bgr_img, *, image_size=(112, 112))
```

Convert aligned BGR face crop(s) to AdaFace-style NCHW input.
